subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Dost thou weep at the separation from thy son when the Son of God doth make mention of thee in truth? If thou be fair in judgement, would this be befitting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله ا تبکی من فراق ابنک اذا ابن الله یذکرک بالحق ان انصفی هل ینبغی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @soul; spirit after death, @thankfulness; gratitude
